name_cn:
Vintage Distressed Finish
MIU New Arrival Academic Style Backpack: 5BZ043. Premium distressed lambskin paired with sturdy, wear-resistant linen-blend lining. This leather backpack features a campus-style design, blending exquisite craftsmanship with a casual attitude. Distinctive multi-pocket design highlights MIU's fashionable and playful spirit. Classic leather backpack strap and shoulder strap. A versatile styling essential: pairs with white T-shirt and jeans, khaki trench coat, casual sportswear... endless styles. Fits the universe inside: iPad, folding umbrella, makeup bag. Practical, lightweight, and full of sophistication.
Size: 22X18X11.5cm
